defaultAgent.description: Agent used for tasks that don't specify one, and for roadmap/verify sessions.

maxConcurrent.description: Per-project cap on concurrent sessions. null = use the global setting.

roadmapEnabled.description: Whether the roadmap loop may auto-generate tasks when the queue empties.

verifyEnabled.description: Whether finished tasks are auto-verified by a verifier session.

tags.description: Free-form labels associated with the project.
